name: Minestrone Genovese (Vegetable Soup with Pesto)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cup Dried white kidney beans, soaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and combine with the water in a Dutch oven.
2. Bring to a boil and cook at high heat for 10 minutes.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for another 5 minutes.
4. Add the potatoes, squash, zucchini, tomato, and mushrooms; cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
5. After about 15 minutes, add the carrot, celery, garlic, and onion. Simmer for another 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the olive oil and salt. Continue simmering, pressing the beans and potatoes against the side of the pot to make the soup dense.
7. After another 15 minutes of cooking, add the pasta and simmer for 9 or 10 minutes until it is al dente.
8. Just as the heat is turned off, stir in the pesto.
9. Let the soup cool until it is tepid and serve with drizzles of olive oil on top.
